narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 1-C (precinct in Huron County) has 576 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
